worthSeeing.title: Machu Picchu:
worthSeeing.text: The iconic Inca citadel in the Andes, one of the world's greatest archaeological wonders.

worthSeeing.title: Amazon Basin:
worthSeeing.text: Iquitos and Manu National Park offer access to pristine Amazonian wilderness.

worthSeeing.title: Lake Titicaca:
worthSeeing.text: The highest navigable lake in the world, home to the Uros floating reed islands.
